penalties.description: Task appears to be a knot tying demonstration rather than complete FLS Task 5. No visible suture placement through marked targets or completion.

consensus_score.reasoning: Claude correctly identified this as an incomplete task - a knot tying demonstration without the required FLS Task 5 components (Penrose drain with marked targets, suture placement through targets). GPT-4o incorrectly scored this as a completed task with 58-second completion time. The video shows only knot tying technique without the official FLS Task 5 setup and requirements.

disagreements.rationale: Task 5 requires suture placement through marked targets on a Penrose drain. This video shows only knot tying demonstration without the required task components, making it an incomplete attempt that cannot receive a completion time.

claude_value.description: Task appears to be a knot tying demonstration rather than complete FLS Task 5. No visible suture placement through marked targets or completion.

gpt_value.description: Hand switch was not clearly visible after the first throw.

disagreements.rationale: FLS Task 5 has specific requirements including Penrose drain setup and suture placement through targets. Without these components, the task is incomplete regardless of knot tying technique quality.
The phases detected should reflect what actually occurred. This was a knot tying demonstration, not a complete FLS Task 5 with the required setup and target placement.
